author: Drew Angerer
title: Experts describe Scott Bessent as a credible, safe pick for US Treasury secretary | National | foxbangor.com
text: Experts describe Scott Bessent as a credible, safe pick for US Treasury secretary Drew Angerer Nov 23, 2024 Nov 23, 2024 Updated 10 mins ago Facebook Twitter WhatsApp SMS Email Print Copy article link Save Experts describe Scott Bessent as a credible, safe pick for US Treasury secretary Drew Angerer Tags Partners/afp As featured on Trump to name hedge fund manager Scott Bessent as Treasury chief: US media US President-elect Donald Trump is expected to pick billionaire Scott Bessent as his Treasury secretary, media outlets reported Friday, choosing the hedge fund manager to help execute an agenda promising tax cuts and tariffs. Trump names hedge fund manager Scott Bessent as Treasury chief US President-elect Donald Trump on Friday named billionaire Scott Bessent as his Treasury secretary, choosing the hedge fund manager to help execute an agenda promising tax cuts and tariffs. +3 Scott Bessent a credible, safe pick for Treasury: experts Hedge fund manager Scott Bessent is a credible, safe choice for US Treasury secretary -- and one that is likely positive for markets -- observers said Saturday following President-elect Donald Trump's highly anticipated nomination. Trump to name hedge fund manager Scott Bessent as Treasury chief: US media US President-elect Donald Trump is expected to pick billionaire Scott Bessent as his Treasury secretary, media outlets reported Friday, choosing the hedge fund manager to help execute an agenda promising tax cuts and tariffs. Trump names hedge fund manager Scott Bessent as Treasury chief US President-elect Donald Trump on Friday named billionaire Scott Bessent as his Treasury secretary, choosing the hedge fund manager to help execute an agenda promising tax cuts and tariffs. +3 Scott Bessent a credible, safe pick for Treasury: experts Hedge fund manager Scott Bessent is a credible, safe choice for US Treasury secretary -- and one that is likely positive for markets -- observers said Saturday following President-elect Donald Trump's highly anticipated nomination.
